title: vitex glabrata var. bombacifolia
intro: Vitex glabrata var. bombacifolia, also known as the "Hairy Chaste Tree," is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and menstrual disorders. The health benefits of Vitex glabrata var. bombacifolia include reducing menstrual cramp pain, regulating menstrual cycles, and promoting relaxation. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to create teas, capsules, and topical creams for various health applications.
